item.title: Sonic - 3rd Year University Project
item.description: A short summary of what the project is and how it was implemented. What is Sonic? Sonic is a system my project partner Jason and I designed for our third-year project at university. It was a solution to a problem we were facing often at the time, which was COVID contact tracing, and how to efficiently implement this. Sonic consists of a Go REST API, a PostgreSQL database, NFC cards and both Python and React Native clients.
